title: goodyera tesselata
intro: Goodyera tesselata, also known as the tessellated rattlesnake plant, is a type of orchid native to the northeastern United States and southeastern Canada. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Goodyera tesselata include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and prevent infection. Goodyera tesselata is typically prepared as a tea or tincture for medicinal use, although specific herbal preparations and dosages may vary depending on the intended application.
